issues.title: Pagination breaks when filter has > 100 items
issues.body: On the admin list view, applying a filter with more than 100 matching items shows page 1 but the page-2 button is dead. Looks like the count query uses the filtered count but the link uses the unfiltered count.

issues.title: Add audit log for billing changes
issues.body: Every time a billing plan changes (upgrade, downgrade, cancel), we should write an audit row with the actor, the before/after, and the timestamp.

issues.title: Webhook retries hammer downstream when the upstream is flapping
issues.body: Reported by two customers. When the receiving end returns 5xx intermittently, our retry loop fires too aggressively. Switch to exponential backoff with jitter; cap at 6 retries.

issues.title: Code blocks in posts overflow on mobile
issues.body: Long lines in code samples cause horizontal scroll on phones. The body wrapper should clamp them.

issues.title: Add dark-mode toggle that respects prefers-color-scheme
issues.body: Default to system preference; allow override; persist the override in localStorage.

issues.title: Hero CTA hard to find on mobile
issues.body: Heat-map shows visitors miss the primary CTA on small screens. Try sticky CTA below the fold; A/B test.

issues.title: Replace stock photo on /about with team photo
issues.body: Awkward stock shot on /about. We have a real team photo from the offsite — use that.

issues.title: Pricing page should pull live prices from the billing service
issues.body: Currently hard-coded. When we change a plan price in the admin, the marketing site lies for hours until someone manually updates the YAML. Pull from the public pricing endpoint at build time and re-deploy on changes.
